briefdescription.para: Return the starting time, in fractional seconds since Igor Pro epoch in UTC, of the given sweep.

detaileddescription.para: For existing sweeps with HIGH_PREC_SWEEP_START_KEY labnotebook entries we use the sweep wave's modification time. The sweep wave can be either an DAQDataWave or a Sweep_$num wave. Passing the DAQDataWave is more accurate.

briefdescription.para: Return the creation time, in seconds since Igor Pro epoch in UTC, of the oldest sweep wave for all devices.

detaileddescription.para: Return NaN if no sweeps could be found

briefdescription.para: Return the HDF5 file identifier referring to an open NWB file for export.

detaileddescription.para: Open one if it does not exist yet.

parameterdescription.para: Set NWB version if new file is created
[optional] file path for new files to override the internal generation algorithm
HDF5 file identifier or NaN on user abort
new NWB file was created (1) or an existing opened (0)

memberdef.argsstring: (variable nwbVersion, string overrideFilePath=defaultValue, variable writeStoredTestPulses=defaultValue, variable writeIgorHistory=defaultValue, variable compressionMode=defaultValue, variable keepFileOpen=defaultValue, variable overwrite=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: NWB_ExportAllData

briefdescription.para: Programmatically export all acquired data from all devices into a NWB file.

parameterdescription.para: major NWB format version, one of 1 or 2 (aka NWB_VERSION_LATEST)
use this file path instead of an internally derived one
[optional, defaults to false] store the raw test pulse data
[optional, defaults to true] store the Igor Pro history and the log file
[optional, defaults to chunked compression] One of CompressionMode
[optional, defaults to false] keep the NWB file open after return, or close it
[optional, defaults to false] overwrite any existing NWB file with the same name, only used when overrideFilePath is passed

briefdescription.para: Wait for ASYNC nwb writing to finish.

detaileddescription.para: Currently wait up to 10min (NWB_ASYNC_WRITING_TIMEOUT * NWB_ASYNC_MAX_ITERATIONS), everything above 5s is considered a bug.

briefdescription.para: Return the file size in MiB of the currently written into NWB file.

detaileddescription.para: This is only approximately correct as the file is open in HDF5 and thus not everything is flushed.

briefdescription.para: Export all stimsets into NWB.

detaileddescription.para: NWB file is closed after the function returns.

briefdescription.para: Export all data into NWB using compression.

detaileddescription.para: Ask the file location from the user

parameterdescription.para: Export all data and referenced stimsets (NWB_EXPORT_DATA) or all stimsets (NWB_EXPORT_STIMSETS)
[optional, defaults to latest version] major NWB version

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable nwbVersion, variable locationID, variable compressionMode)
memberdef.name: NWB_AppendStoredTestPulses

briefdescription.para: Write the stored test pulses to the NWB file.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable nwbVersion, variable locationID, string stimsets, variable compressionMode)
memberdef.name: NWB_AppendStimset

briefdescription.para: Export given stimsets to NWB file.

parameterdescription.para: major NWB version
Identifier of open hdf5 group or file
Single stimset as string or list of stimsets sparated by ;
Type of compression to use, one of CompressionMode

briefdescription.para: Prepare everything for sweep-by-sweep NWB export.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, wave DAQDataWave, wave DAQConfigWave, variable sweep, variable nwbVersion)
memberdef.name: NWB_AppendSweepDuringDAQ

briefdescription.para: Get stimsets by analysing currently loaded sweep.

detaileddescription.para: numericalValues and textualValues are generated from device

briefdescription.para: Get stimsets by analysing dataFolder of loaded sweep.

detaileddescription.para: numericalValues and textualValues are generated from previously loaded data. used in the context of loading from a stored experiment file. on load a sweep is stored in a device/dataFolder hierarchy.

briefdescription.para: Get related Stimsets by corresponding sweep.

detaileddescription.para: input numerical and textual values storage waves for current sweep

memberdef.argsstring: (wave numericalValues, WaveTextOrNull textualValues, variable sweep, variable channelNumber, variable channelType)
memberdef.name: NWB_FetchEpochs

briefdescription.para: Return free text wave with the epoch information of the given channel.

detaileddescription.para: See GetEpochsWave() for the wave layout.

xrefdescription.para: we don't yet write epoch info into the LBN

briefdescription.para: Clear all entries which are channel specific.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable nwbVersion, variable locationID, wave custom_wave, variable compressionMode)
memberdef.name: NWB_WriteStimsetCustomWave

briefdescription.para: Save Custom Wave (from stimset) in NWB file.

parameterdescription.para: major NWB version
Open HDF5 group or file identifier
Wave reference to the wave that is to be saved
[optional, defaults to NO_COMPRESSION] Type of compression to use, one of CompressionMode

memberdef.argsstring: (variable nwbVersion, variable locationID, string stimSet, variable compressionMode)
memberdef.name: NWB_WriteStimsetTemplateWaves

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string stimset, variable overwrite, variable verbose=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: NWB_LoadStimset

briefdescription.para: Load specified stimset from Stimset Group.

parameterdescription.para: id of an open hdf5 group containing the stimsets
string of stimset
[optional] set to get more output to the command line
indicate whether the stored stimsets should be deleted if they exist

briefdescription.para: Load a custom wave from NWB file.

detaileddescription.para: loads waves that were saved by NWB_WriteStimsetCustomWave

parameterdescription.para: open file or group from nwb file
full Path in igor notation to custom wave
indicate whether the stored custom wave should be deleted if it exists

briefdescription.para: Load all stimsets from specified HDF5 file.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, shows a dialog on default] provide full file name/path for loading stimset
[optional, defaults to false] indicate if the stored stimset should be deleted before the load.
[optional, defaults to false] load only builtin stimsets

memberdef.argsstring: (variable groupID, string stimsets, variable overwrite, string processedStimsets=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: NWB_LoadStimsets

briefdescription.para: Load specified stimsets and their dependencies from NWB file.

parameterdescription.para: Open Stimset Group of HDF5 File. See OpenStimset()
";" separated list of all stimsets of the current sweep.
[optional] the list indicates which stimsets were already loaded. on recursion this parameter avoids duplicate circular references.
indicate whether the stored stimsets should be deleted if they exist

briefdescription.para: Load custom waves for specified stimset from Igor experiment file.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable nwbVersion, WaveText numericalKeys, wave numericalValues, WriteChannelParams *p, TimeSeriesProperties *tsp)
memberdef.name: NWB_GetTimeSeriesProperties

memberdef.argsstring: (WaveText numericalKeys, wave numericalValues, variable sweep, string settingsProp, string nwbProp, variable headstage, TimeSeriesProperties *tsp, variable factor=defaultValue, string enabledProp=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: NWB_AddSweepDataSets

briefdescription.para: function saves contents of specified notebook to data folder

parameterdescription.para: id of nwb file or notebooks folder
name of notebook to be loaded
igor data folder where data should be loaded into

briefdescription.para: Flushes the contents of the NWB file to disc.
NWB Functions related to MIES data export into the NeuroDataWithoutBorders format

detaileddescription.para:
For writing a full NWB file the following functions are used:
NWB_GetFileForExport()
NWB_AddDeviceSpecificData()
AddModificationTimeEntry()
NWB_AddDevice()
NWB_WriteLabnotebooksAndComments()
NWB_WriteTestpulseData()
NWB_AppendSweepLowLevel() for each sweep
NWB_AppendStimset() for each stimset
AddModificationTimeEntry()
NWB_AppendIgorHistoryAndLogFile()

For exporting sweep-by-sweep:
NWB_PrepareExport(), once from DAP_CheckSettings() before DAQ
NWB_AppendStimset() for all stimsets
AddModificationTimeEntry()
NWB_AppendSweepDuringDAQ():
NWB_ASYNC_Worker()
AddModificationTimeEntry()
NWB_AddDevice()
NWB_WriteLabnoteBooksAndComments()
NWB_AppendSweepLowLevel()
NWB_Flush()
